scripts.deploy: pnpm run build && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.deploy:staging: pnpm run build && wrangler deploy --env staging

KV.description: Stores encrypted payloads and envelope metadata.

CF_SECRET_PART.description: Server-side secret part (Part A) used in HKDF to derive KEK.

INDEX_SECRET.description: HMAC secret used to obfuscate key paths before KV storage.
